allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.readline\(\)\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in [''message'']}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(do python3 -c " import json, sys with open\(''$f''\) as fh: for line in fh: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'' and d.get\(''message'',{}\).get\(''stop_reason''\): print\(d[''message''][''stop_reason'']\) except: pass " done)

Bash(do python3 -c " import json with open\(''$f''\) as fh: for line in fh: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: d = json.loads\(line\) t = d.get\(''type'',''?''\) st = d.get\(''subtype'',''''\) if st: print\(f''{t}/{st}''\) else: print\(t\) except: pass " done)

Bash(do python3 -c " import json with open\(''$f''\) as fh: for line in fh: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'': sr = d.get\(''message'',{}\).get\(''stop_reason'',''none''\) print\(sr\) except: pass " done)

Bash(do python3 -c " import json with open\(''$f''\) as fh: d = json.load\(fh\) op = d.get\(''originalPath'',''?''\) count = len\(d.get\(''entries'',[]\)\) print\(f''{count} sessions | {op}''\) " done)

Bash(do python3 -c " import json with open\(''$f''\) as fh: d = json.load\(fh\) if not d.get\(''originalPath''\) and d.get\(''entries''\): print\(f''FILE: $f''\) entry = d[''entries''][0] print\(json.dumps\({k: entry[k] for k in entry if k != ''firstPrompt''}, indent=2\)\) break " done)
